title: Unified benchmark suite with CLI comparison
description: Implement Section 6 of testing-strategy.md. Unified BenchmarkParse function that always runs Go benchmarks and adds CLI comparison sub-benchmarks when -ts-cli is provided. Add latency distribution benchmark (p50/p95/p99). Update Makefile bench target to use TREE_SITTER_CLI variable. Add benchmark fixtures for all 15 languages at 1KB/10KB/100KB sizes.
